MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Fri, 26 Apr 2024 07:50:44 -0700
Subject: College protests over Israel's war in Gaza continue following hundreds of arrests
Message-ID: <662bbf48.630a0220.370f4.7710SMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-us"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" name="viewport"><title>Start Daily</title></head><body bgcolor="#f0f0f0"><table align="center" bgcolor="#f0f0f0" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" dir="left" style="font-family:Segoe UI,-apple-system,helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Lucida Grande,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif" width="100%">
        <tr><td><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" height="52" style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 3px 0 transparent" width="600"><tr><td align="left" style="padding:0;min-width:150px;min-height:50px;vertical-align:middle"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAAC35QHYQX5SXTA6OOGRTDE2GRJPHU5CUV2RB2WSZVB5BLVDVS6JWPRVBX2NA7K72FXTGIQ6F5Q7X2IMP6CIFJGOXQVQFY26MJUMSFMCPLDR342YAREF4IO4WO37OTOQBVCFHBQXHQC2S4D5PAKD4SHRRWBYJ4H2SXJMYVF5DH3A2FLXX27JEE&d=AIAADGBNXJS7E7H7ITWH4HCHHS75V3V37ZHLCJQI6H7Q4XIALR37AZNKCPF4JMJ5C3GIAW2BJJ7IBM46G5TUFHZWUCEWWBY6VDT46UZBBSQSTZSEHIKQD5SXWY55Q7SDRH7QUKFFYAUT7XVTVETTQHXU5CBEDOTIHHK5V6DSIQ6A3WM3GUDLO5Q6LYADKM4WF3WPTQQPC3SB7B2SRA&" id="NewHeaderMicrosoftStartImg" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="MSN" height="45" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.34427CBFF3D4D1C8119FED16222B4DEE&pid=BEmail" style="border:none;text-align:center" width="150"></a></td></tr></table></td></tr>
        <tr><td style="padding:24px 0 24px 0" align="center"><table style="padding:0 3px 0 3px" cellspacing="0" width="600"><tr><td style="padding-right:35px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADONW7PTYXTGM4AS7ABPQWCR4T6EKIYXSA2ZQEZWZB4YXFZPMBGJXQ4XHJL6Y5YYVJQ34YBGRTLUFMX3DRUJLFXYS53CFIKS36TP6WGV7JQJAVTDVRGV4CFH4QREUWXFHTAFYHW3DZR7EIHGLXPBQJY4XWWV5JW7BFX72VWZPRVRUVUKYJ63A&d=AIAAC2UJUHERVPOFQPMBXYU73M5RA2CERTS6FS4UQQQZAARHTZH6CFNN5I7EZ3U3R4BFR2CQHLNNLAWBZVRVTO3FUNNZ76GAQUTRQQ4ETPWRRWKFHF65PAG647B236R2NFNILJWS7JREOQM4D7RN5Q4T332OHGQDQUEKXOCCHD6XBTAUPBIEK4FW&" id="StartHeaderLogo" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="Logo" height="110" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.4464C20B10A9835DC26D56A7CF42E3D7&pid=BEmail&w=230&h=110&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2" style="border:none;margin:0" width="230"></a></td><td><table style="border-collapse:collapse"><tr><td height="50"></td></tr><tr><td style="border-left:2px solid;border-left-color:#ffb980;vertical-align:bottom;padding-left:10px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAAC2U3LHL2WCJDJVIBGLOWPQTQKQAPHYXPJKBG4VHOVLGZXC6IOGP36XHJMVF33BTX5X6N7ST2T744NJBBTXY3OIVOQDAFDWWX43JVILRE337MUUQCAO2GOF5CJFRGORG6NDPQI57ZCF6ODEWMTHDSIBGROFEBBHKH7ZNZINTPVVUQKL3XJ2ZH&d=AIAAD3O7HEA2YH4WAHAN5XYCQ3GNLHTOPBSPBSPFHLJJFFTF5A4UUGLCTRB42PXIT5W7VKP3VPDBCGAB5FGFMZTPSHJSL4SWPX3SV24MCB4S6E5MUK5TBX7CJDXBADYDV6GGZV7TJTFHLHESSPFI45F7TKNQ3BODK6LG6QSEKA5HYBL6OSCTEK7R&" id="StartHeaderDescription" style="border:none;text-align:center;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><span style="color:#464646;font-size:15px;font-weight:400">Start Daily brings you trending news every weekday</span></a></td></tr></table></td></tr></table></td><td><img alt="" height="1" src="https://www.msn.com/newsletter/t/o?telemetrytoken=9e146be431b341948ed613323644aae9&market=en-us&topicid=d015f8a4-f187-4810-888d-afa2d49537cb" style="border:none" width="1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></td></tr>
